drilldown.title: Folder View
drilldown.intro: A visual map of the current folder. Click a slice/cell to drill in; use the path strip above to step back out. Colors show each file's 'safe to delete' score — red = don't touch, green = easy to delete.

staging.title: Pending Deletes
staging.subtitle: Think of it like a trash can — but capped at 24 hours, with no auto-cleanup
staging.intro: Nothing you delete disappears immediately: it waits here for 24 hours. Realized it was a mistake? Hit ↩ Undo. For things you're sure about, use 🔥 to delete forever (double confirmation required). Expired items stay until you act on them — you stay in control.
staging.empty: Nothing deleted yet. Pick a file from the map on the left → use 📥 in the side panel to delete it (recoverable for 24h).
staging.permTitle: Delete forever (double confirmation, cannot be undone)
staging.permWarn: ⚠ This cannot be undone; the file is gone forever and an audit-log entry is written. To confirm, type the exact file name:

detail.title: Selected Item
detail.intro: Click a file in the map on the left — size, last-modified, safety score, and quick actions appear here.
detail.empty: Pick a file from the map on the left → details open here.

conflict.title: Conflict: {name}
conflict.help: Section 12.2.4 — a different file already exists at the target path. Which one do you want to keep?

lock.ownerEmpty: Owner not detected (RestartManager found no process — may be a kernel handle).

onboarding.slide1Body: Maps your 1 TB SSD in seconds. Reads the NTFS MFT directly — Sunburst, Treemap, Bubble, Timeline.
onboarding.slide2Body: 53 built-in rules assign a 0-100 "how safe to delete" score to every folder. node_modules safe (95), pagefile.sys never touch (3).
onboarding.slide3Body: No deletion is immediate. Moved to a staging folder, recoverable for 24h. Cross-volume two-phase commit, conflict resolution, forensic ledger.
onboarding.modeHelp: D-Space uses a two-tier scan strategy. Pick the one that fits — you can change it later via Diagnostics.
onboarding.modeFastB3: No UAC prompt on first launch (Tier 1)

shortcuts.title: ⌨ Keyboard Shortcuts (Section 15.2)
shortcuts.viewModes: View mode — Sunburst · Treemap · Bubble · Timeline
shortcuts.stageDelete: Send the first file in viewport to staging
shortcuts.hint: Shortcuts are disabled while an input/textarea has focus — normal typing is not blocked.

update.restartHint: The app will restart once installation completes
update.errorVerify: Signature verification failed — package corrupted or pubkey mismatch
